sentences.text: The Doctor got his horse, his boots, and his lantern, and rode to the Miller's house with little Hans walking behind.
The storm got worse, and the rain was heavy, so little Hans could not see or keep up with the horse.
He lost his way and wandered onto the moor, which was dangerous, and there he drowned.
Goatherds found his body the next day in a pool of water and took it to the cottage.
